mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ve_xe WHERE ma_khach = #{maKhach} ORDER BY thoi_gian_dat DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ve_xe WHERE UPPER(trang_thai) = UPPER(#{trangThai})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ve_xe (ma_chuyen, ma_khach, ma_ghe_ngoi, trang_thai, ma_diem_len, ma_diem_xuong) VALUES (#{maChuyen}, #{maKhach}, #{maGhe}, #{trangThai}, #{maDiemLen}, #{maDiemXuong})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ve_xe WHERE ma_ve_hien_thi = #{maVeHienThi} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_ve_hien_thi = #{maVeHienThi} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_diem_len = #{maDiemLen}, ma_diem_xuong = #{maDiemXuong} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_ghe_ngoi = #{maGhe} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_chuyen = #{maChuyen}, ma_ghe_ngoi = #{maGhe} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET trang_thai = #{trangThai} WHERE ma = #{ma}

UPDATE ve_xe SET trang_thai = #{trangThai}, so_tien_hoan = #{soTienHoan}, thoi_gian_yeu_cau_hoan = #{thoiGianYeuCauHoan}, stk_hoan = #{stkHoan}, ten_ngan_hang_hoan = #{tenNganHangHoan}, ten_nguoi_nhan_hoan = #{tenNguoiNhanHoan} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET trang_thai = 'REFUNDED', thoi_gian_hoan = #{thoiGianHoan} WHERE ma = #{ma} AND trang_thai = 'REFUND_PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ve_xe WHERE trang_thai = 'REFUND_PENDING' ORDER BY thoi_gian_yeu_cau_hoan ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_khuyen_mai = #{maKhuyenMai}, ma_hinh_thuc = #{maHinhThuc}, so_tien_thanh_toan = #{soTienThanhToan}, ma_don_payos = #{maDonPayOs}, thoi_gian_thanh_toan = #{thoiGianThanhToan}, trang_thai = #{trangThai} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_don_payos = #{maDonPayOs} WHERE ma = #{ma}
UPDATE ve_xe SET ma_don_payos = #{maDonPayOs}, ma_khuyen_mai = #{maKhuyenMai}, so_tien_thanh_toan = #{soTien} WHERE ma = #{ma} AND trang_thai = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ve_xe WHERE ma_don_payos = #{maDonPayOs} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ve_xe WHERE ma_don_payos = #{maDonPayOs} ORDER BY ma
mapper.update: UPDATE ve_xe SET trang_thai = 'EXPIRED' WHERE ma_khach = #{maKhach} AND trang_thai = 'PENDING' AND thoi_gian_dat < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{phut} MINUTE)
UPDATE ve_xe SET trang_thai = 'EXPIRED' WHERE trang_thai = 'PENDING' AND thoi_gian_dat < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{phut} MINUTE)
